name: Abby's Fabulous Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate, butter, and water in the top of a double boiler. Heat the chocolate mixture over simmering water until the chocolate and butter melt. Remove from heat and cool.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a large bowl.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, beat eggs with sour cream until blended. Beat in sugar and vanilla.
4. Stir in the cooled chocolate mixture. Beat into the flour mixture, half at a time, just until smooth. The batter will be thin.
5. Pour evenly into 2 greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until the center springs back when lightly pressed with a fingertip.
7. Cool in the pans on wire racks. Loosen edges with a knife and turn out onto the racks.
8. Stack cakes, frosting between layers using about 1/4 of the frosting. Frost the top and sides with the remaining frosting, making deep swirls with a spatula.
9. If chocolate drizzle is desired, melt 1 square of chocolate with 1 tablespoon butter in a cup set over hot water. Stir until smooth. Drizzle over the top of the cake, letting the mixture drip down the sides.
10. Fluffy White Frosting: Combine egg whites, sugar, cream of tartar, salt, and water in the top of a large double boiler. Beat until blended. Place the top over simmering water. Cook, beating constantly with an electric or rotary beater, about 7 minutes or until the mixture forms stiff peaks. Remove from water. Stir in vanilla.
